# Cardinal Studio

> Solo digital studio in Alentejo, Portugal. Diogo Dias rebuilds websites for brands worth being a fan of — gaming studios, IP with fanbase, small businesses run by people who are themselves fans of what they sell. Hand-built static sites with brand voice extraction and SEO + AI-search-optimisation foundation included as standard. Bilingual PT-PT / EN delivery.

## Services

- [Brand-led website](https://cardinalstudio.dev/work.html): hand-built static site. Custom design, brand voice extraction, copy in the founder's voice, SEO + AISEO pass (JSON-LD schema, sitemap, llms.txt, OG card, search-console verification, Google Business Profile setup) included as standard.
- [Email + calendar agent](https://cardinalstudio.dev/): automated triage on the client's inbox, drafted replies in the client's voice, calendar booking integration via Cal.com or similar. Available on the Complete tier.

## Coverage area

Based in Alentejo, Portugal — works remotely, worldwide. Languages: PT-PT (primary), English, Spanish.

## Contact

- Email: diogo@cardinalstudio.dev (replies under 24h on weekdays)
- Booking: https://cal.com/diogo-dias-zg18dh/15min (15-min intro call, free, no pitch deck)
- No forms, no funnels — Diogo reads every email personally.

## How engagements work

1. Email with what you need.
2. 30-minute discovery call (free, no pitch deck).
3. Fixed scope and timeline written up.
4. Build, iterate, ship.

## Recent work

- [CPS Plastering & Rendering](https://cpsplastering.cardinalstudio.dev/): reimagined website for a Coventry plastering and rendering business. Drag-to-compare case studies, quote form, embedded Google + Trustpilot social proof.

## About the studio

- Founder: Diogo Dias, solo operator, ENI (Portuguese sole-proprietor status).
- Multi-disciplinary: web development, design, game development, brand, product management.
- Tagline: "Not an agency. A player." The studio works best for brands the operator is themselves a fan of.
- Founded: 2026. Currently running an early-adopter cohort with discounted setup fees.

## All pages

- [Home](https://cardinalstudio.dev/) — landing, latest work, patch notes, talk
- [Work](https://cardinalstudio.dev/work.html) — selected published cases
- [Process](https://cardinalstudio.dev/process.html) — the four-step engagement: email intake → 30-min call → fixed scope → build
- [About](https://cardinalstudio.dev/about.html) — why solo, why brand-led, where Cardinal Studio is NOT a fit
- [Contact](https://cardinalstudio.dev/contact.html) — direct line + FAQ (response time, geography, languages, NDAs)
